case_title: THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF VS. ALLISON JONES et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS DBA THE SAN FRANCISCO SPCA VETERINARY HOSPITAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, ALLISON $4,171.30 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $59.43 INTEREST, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,304.73, SEE SCANNED DOC
